title: simpa Colour Wire Metal Wine Beer Milk Beverage 6 Bottle Carrier Holder Caddy with Handle - Matt Red
features: Stylish Versatility: The Simpa Colour Wire Metal 6 Bottle Carrier Holder Caddy combines functionality with flair, available in 10 vibrant colors: Cream, Grey, Mushroom, Light Blue, White, Green, Pink, Black, Lilac, and Red, to match any decor or occasion.

Sturdy and Lightweight: Crafted with a lightweight yet sturdy design, this caddy ensures easy portability without compromising on strength, making it perfect for picnics, parties, or simply organizing your beverages at home.
Spacious and Secure: Comfortably accommodating bottles with a diameter of up to 9cm, this carrier ensures your wine, beer, milk, or other beverages are securely held in place during transport.

Convenient Dimensions: With dimensions of 30cm (H) x 32cm (L) x 21.5cm (D), this caddy offers ample space for six bottles while maintaining a compact size that fits effortlessly in your car, kitchen, or outdoor setup.

Practical and Chic: Featuring a sturdy handle for easy carrying, the Simpa Colour Wire Metal Bottle Carrier is not only practical but also a chic addition to any event, enhancing both style and convenience for all your beverage needs.
